description: Hyperbrowser provides cloud browser infrastructure for AI agents and automation, including browser sessions, web scraping, agent tasks, and sandboxes. Developers use it to run and control browsers or sandboxed compute without managing the underlying infrastructure.
summary: Hyperbrowser exposes an authenticated REST API at https://api.hyperbrowser.ai, a local MCP server package (`hyperbrowser-mcp`), and the `hx` CLI for sandbox workflows; docs also describe separate X402-paid HTTP endpoints under the same API host.
